Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER IN RE PATRICK DALY'S Notice Of Continuance Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement is a duplicate entry.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Seettlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., of Law Office of Elizabeth MacDonald, Tel. 415.922.5939, appearing specially for Petitioner and moving party.
Patrick Daly, Tel. 415.244.5432, Petitioner.

RULING: Mr. Patrick Daly was sworn and examined. After hearing, Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By and Between Patrick Daly and J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Seettlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Continued To Mar-21-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PETITIONER IN RE PATRICK DALY'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Seettlement Payment Rights IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2012 WITH THE CONDITION THAT MR. DALY BE PERSONALLY PRESENT IN COURT AND IF NOT, THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE MATTER TO ANOTHER DATE. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
